---
title: "A Real-World Evaluation of LLM Medication Safety Reviews in NHS Primary Care"
description: "arXiv, 2025"
date: 2025-01-01
venue: "arXiv"
citation-text: "Oliver Normand, Esther Borsi, Mitch Fruin, Lauren E Walker, Jamie Heagerty, Chris C. Holmes, Anthony J Avery, Iain E Buchan, Harry Coppock, A Real-World Evaluation of LLM Medication Safety Reviews in NHS Primary Care, arXiv, 2025"
---
